name: Goat Cheese Crostini with Flash Tomato Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 fresh tomatoes, cored and roughly chopped
recipeInstructions:
1 Remove all of the crust from the baguette, slice it lengthwise into approximately 4 slices. Spread goat cheese along two of the slices, layer with tarragon, sprinkle with salt and pepper. Cover with another slice.
2 Prepare egg wash by lightly whisking 2 eggs. Dip each crostini in egg wash then coat with bread crumbs.
3 Heat 2 tbsp olive oil in a pan until hot, then add crostini. Cook until golden on one side, then turn over and cook until golden on the other side.
4 For the sauce, heat the pan until very hot, then add olive oil. Add chopped onions and tomatoes, cooking for 2-3 minutes without simmering. Finish with garlic and lemon juice.
5 In the center of the plate, arrange the sauce. Then cut each crostini into 4 pieces and arrange around the sauce.
Wine suggestions: Atlas Peak Sangiovese 1993 or Ravenswood Merlot 1993
